rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow new users to complete registration.
The system shall end access if registration fails.
The system shall allow registered users to sign in.
The system shall provide access to available facilities after signing in.
The system shall allow users to read news and expert content.
The system shall provide health-related information allowing users to check symptoms or use fitness checking options.
The system shall allow users to continue using the system or finish the session after viewing a result.
The system shall process and validate insurance for available finance-related services.
The system shall check payment with insurance for doctor consultations and complete the payment process.
The system shall allow users to select payment methods (cash or insurance) for drug and supplement purchases.
The system shall inform users about cash payment details if chosen as the payment method.
The system shall complete the payment process for insurance-based payments.
The system shall collect user feedback after service completion.
The system shall log out users at the end of their session.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows new users to complete registration.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user is new, the user first completes registration.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system ends access if registration fails.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the registration is unsuccessful, access ends there.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows registered users to sign in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the registration is successful, or if the user is already registered, the user signs in to the system.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After signing in, the system provides access to available facilities.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After signing in, the user can access the available facilities.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows users to read news and expert content.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: the user may choose to read news and expert content

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system provides health-related information where users can check symptoms or use fitness checking options.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: the user can either check symptoms to get possible disease-related results or use the fitness checking option to calculate fitness-related results.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After viewing a result, the system allows users to continue using the system or finish the session.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After viewing the result, the user may continue using the system or finish the session.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system processes and validates insurance for available finance-related services.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If insurance is already available, the insurance is processed and validated. If insurance is not available, the user goes through the application process and the provided details are validated before insurance is provided.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system checks payment with insurance for doctor consultations and completes the payment process.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user has consulted a doctor, the user goes through the payment process, where insurance details are checked and payment is completed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: For drug and supplement purchases, the system allows users to select payment methods (cash or insurance).
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user has chosen drugs and supplements, the user selects how the payment will be handled.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system informs users about cash payment details if they choose that method.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the selected payment type is cash, the amount and return date are prepared and the user is informed to pay at the time of delivery.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system completes the payment process for insurance-based payments.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the selected payment type is through insurance, the payment process is completed by checking insurance details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system collects user feedback after service completion.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once payment is completed, the user may choose whether to provide feedback. If the user chooses to do so, feedback is collected for the service.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system logs out users at the end of their session.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, the user finishes the session and logs out of the system.
